text:
Market today: Mixed signals. Geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices are headwinds, potentially fueling inflation and pressuring tech valuations. Samsung's strong chip profits are positive, but AI spending concerns cloud the outlook for the sector.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down 23.52% and flagged "SELL"; respect its stop. Your new SPAL position is also down 11.17% and leveraged; monitor its stop closely. Remember margin amplifies drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on oil prices and geopolitical developments. Also, watch for further clarity on AI spending trends.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk in your leveraged, negative positions and be selective with new entries amidst mixed signals.
plays: Respect SOXL's stop at 200; this leveraged ETF is decaying and deeply negative, especially on margin.
Keep a close eye on your new SPAL position; it's leveraged and already down, so respect the 21.38 stop.
Consider LRCX, a chip equipment name, as a new long if it hits scanner entry 349.85-349.23, with stop at 347.77. Samsung's chip profit jump is a positive backdrop.
